summary: Cosmic Context API, Dream Patterns Dashboard, and Cross-Page Interconnection features - All 10 features tested and verified. Backend APIs (cosmic-context, dreams/patterns, cosmic-calendar) working correctly. Frontend pages (Cosmic Calendar, Dreams Patterns tab, Daily Ritual, Mayan, Numerology, Aromatherapy) all display correctly with CosmicBanner and cross-links.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 2 logged dreams
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cosmic Context API and Dream Patterns features complete. Test user has 2 dreams logged. Backend APIs: GET /api/cosmic-context returns unified cosmic snapshot (moon, mayan, numerology, aura, suggestions, recent_dreams), GET /api/dreams/patterns returns dream analysis (total, lucid_count, avg_vividness, symbol_frequency, moon_correlations, insights). Frontend: CosmicBanner component shows on Dreams, Daily Ritual, Aromatherapy pages when logged in. Mayan and Numerology pages have Connected Systems cross-links.

cosmic_calendar_page_loads.description: Cosmic Calendar page loads at /cosmic-calendar showing Numerology, Moon, Mayan, and Cardology cards in a grid

cosmic_calendar_practices_section.description: Today's Cosmic Practices section shows clickable suggestions (yoga, aromatherapy, herbology, acupressure) that navigate to correct pages

cosmic_calendar_recent_dreams.description: Recent Dreams section shows at bottom with 2 dreams (Test Flying Dream, Flying over mountains) and View All link

dreams_patterns_tab.description: Dreams page Patterns tab shows statistics (2 Dreams Logged, 1 Lucid Dreams, 6.5/10 Avg Vividness), recurring symbols bar chart (Water, Flying, Moon, Mountain), moon correlations, and insights (Lucid Awareness: 50%)

dreams_sage_button.description: Deep Dream Analysis with Sage button navigates to /coach

daily_ritual_cosmic_banner.description: Daily Ritual page shows CosmicBanner with moon phase (First Quarter), Mayan glyph (Blue Night), aura (blue), and practice suggestions when logged in

mayan_connected_systems.description: Mayan Astrology page shows Connected Systems section with links to /cosmic-calendar, /dreams, /numerology, /daily-ritual - all clickable and navigate correctly

numerology_connected_systems.description: Numerology page shows Connected Systems section with links to /cosmic-calendar, /mayan, /coach, /daily-ritual - all clickable and navigate correctly

aromatherapy_cosmic_banner.description: Aromatherapy page shows CosmicBanner with relevant aromatherapy suggestion (Chamomile or Ylang Ylang essential oil)

cosmic_banner_moon_navigation.description: Clicking cosmic banner moon phase badge navigates to /cosmic-calendar

api_verification.GET /api/cosmic-context: Returns unified cosmic snapshot with moon, mayan, numerology, aura_color, suggestions, recent_dreams, recurring_symbols, practices, streak, dominant_mood
api_verification.GET /api/dreams/patterns: Returns dream analysis with total, lucid_count, avg_vividness, symbol_frequency, moon_correlations, moon_moods, mood_timeline, insights
api_verification.GET /api/cosmic-calendar/today: Returns date, energy_summary, numerology (personal_year/month/day), moon (phase, code, guidance), mayan (kin, glyph, galactic_signature), cardology (card, suit, value)
